response.step_by_step_log: The on-screen text 'DIAMOND GIRLFRIEND' and 'ROCKIN BIBOO' was identified. Using 'DIAMOND GIRLFRIEND' as the song title, I performed a search for lyrics using the query 'DIAMOND GIRLFRIEND IRyS Japanese and English lyrics'. The song is a primary English/Japanese hybrid track by IRyS. The performers in the video are IRyS, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Koseki Bijou.
response.global_summary: A 3D music video featuring IRyS, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Koseki Bijou performing the song 'DIAMOND GIRLFRIEND' by IRyS feat. Motsu in a virtual environment with driving themed visuals.

scenes.description: The video begins with IRyS performing, followed by the appearance of the other performers in a driving-themed concert stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro: IRyS & MOTSU] 
No one can dull my shine tonight 
No one can dull my shine 
No one can dull my shine tonight 
No one can dull my shine 

[Verse 1: IRyS & MOTSU] 
Save me, I think I'm freezing up 
So cold inside 
Save me, I need a guiding touch 
In these dark times 
Inside the maze of your heart 
I'm the soul that strays 
But baby look at me, you're not blind 
Oh, can't you see that I can be refined 

[Pre-Chorus: MOTSU, IRyS & MOTSU] 
Your heart is super hot right now, it's time 
To be your diamond girlfriend
